name: io.github.codespar/mcp-stripe
description: MCP server for Stripe — global standard-bearer payments API (PaymentIntents, Checkout, Billing, Refunds)

environmentVariables.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Stripe secret key (sk_test_... for test mode, sk_live_... for live mode). The key prefix selects the environment — no separate base URL.

environmentVariables.name: STRIPE_API_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: Optional Stripe API version to pin via the Stripe-Version header (e.g. '2024-06-20'). When omitted, Stripe uses the account's default version.
